entry.title: It cannot be a lie if no one hears
entry.summary:
Author: Once_A_Monarch

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,354Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 65

Summary: Merlin doesn't reveal his magic when Arthur wakes up in DoTD pt2. Instead, Morgana reveals it in their last confrontation. (Aka Merlin goes slightly feral and unlocks the depths of his magic.)

entry.title: Young Hearts, Run Free
entry.summary:
Author: NotoriousJYT

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,150Chapters: 7/20Kudos: 166

Summary: Merlin saunters across the room to the table, long legs gracefully striding. As he passes by Arthur, their arms brush against one another. They both gasp at the brief shock of electricity as skin touches skin. Forgetting himself, Arthur reaches out and lightly traces Merlin’s forearm with his index and middle fingers. Merlin stops in wonderment, his gasp coming out as a whisper, as he watches Arthur’s fingers dancing up his arm. He looks up, and Arthur is staring at him intently. “Hi,” says Merlin. “Hi,” Arthur replies. Or It started the night before Arthur faces the wraith of his uncle Tristan de Bois.Merlin decides to give Arthur several gifts.Neither expects those acts to spark an all-consuming relationship that redefines them both — and quietly begins to rewrite their pre-ordained destiny.No longer two sides of the same coin, they become one joined at the heart.This is their story.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Arthur & Merlin, A Romantic Story of the Ancient Feud Between the Camelot Houses of Pendragon and Emrys
entry.summary:
Author: Buttigieg68

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,263Chapters: 5/7Kudos: 5

Summary: “Alright. Be serious. Tell me who it is." “I can’t bear to say his name.” “Come on.” “Well, I’ll tell you. He’s a boy, Gwen." “Oh. Well done. I assumed that when you said you were in love.” “And he’s beautiful.” “Good for you.” “But he doesn’t want to know.” Arthur took out a handkerchief and dabbed at his eyes.  “He’s not interested in Pendragons; he says he never will be. He won’t listen to anything I say. When our eyes meet, he looks the other way. I’ve even offered him money.” “Well. He’s determined not to have a man.”

entry.title: As beautiful as in our dreams
entry.summary:
Author: Linowish

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 699Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 5

Summary: After season 1, we said "I wish it was like this" and I wanted to try it too.   Merlin was getting really tired and continuing with his life without receiving any thanks; it was very difficult.Arthur was like everyone around him; everyone saw him only as a prince, no one saw him as a friend, except Merlin.

entry.title: karen rescues a king in central park
entry.summary:
Author: JustAnotherRogueSelkie

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,393Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 35

Summary: Claire answered the phone grumpily, as she always did. Most of the time, the grumpiness was warranted. “Whaddya want?” she asked. “There’s this guy, sounds German or something but google translate isn’t picking up the language. Pretty sure he said the word Arthur though. And... Myrddin. And Camelot. Context clues, I think he’s claiming to be King Arthur.” “Karen, I swear, if you are prank calling me.” “I’m not. He’s this hunky blond dude, not as hunky as your Luke though, got a sword and everything. Wearing armor. I found him passed out by the Central Park reservoir. He’s kinda injured. No ID or anything.” “I’m coming over. You owe me. Again. Where are you?” “I brought him to the office. Seemed the best thing to do, in the circumstances.”   Merlin and Arthur in the MCU, just trying to live their lives. Featuring: Arthur's *dramatic* return and subsequent rescue from Central Park by Karen Page and a long-suffering Claire Temple, Brett Mahoney investigating that guy working in the morgue who's almost more of a cryptid than Daredevil, Merlin continuing to be lightly stalked by druids, and presumably, at some point, some actual vigilantes.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: [Podfic] in your heart shall burn
entry.summary:
Author: SpaceshipsAndWine

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 40Chapters: 4/6Kudos: 4

entry.title: Reflect What You Are
entry.summary:
Author: Howlingoose

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,340Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 36

Summary: Alone and isolated by his immortality, Merlin journeys once more to Camelot, to the site of an old story Gaius once told him. Beneath the castle, in a hidden crypt, it is said sorcerers once escaped Uther's purges - but how? And to where? Merlin intends to find out. But when he stumbles into another world, another Camelot, when he finds Arthur, alive but changed, he must do all he can to prove himself true. Even if it means his own undoing. - Art by the brilliant Shadow_Hole!

entry.title: [ART] Reflect what you are
entry.summary:
Author: Shadow_Hole

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 13

Summary: Alone and isolated by his immortality, Merlin journeys once more to Camelot, to the site of an old story Gaius once told him. Beneath the castle, in a hidden crypt, it is said sorcerers once escaped Uther's purges - but how? And to where? Merlin intends to find out. But when he stumbles into another world, another Camelot, when he finds Arthur, alive but changed, he must do all he can to prove himself true. Even if it means his own undoing. Art for BBC Merlin RVBB 2025-2026.

entry.title: To the god at my feet, I offer sanctuary
entry.summary:
Author: TimesOnlyReason

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,392Chapters: 12/18Kudos: 121

Summary: In a flash of motion the blade of Excalibur rests against the hollow of Merlin's neck. ‘You are not fighting back,’ Arthur breathes with the shock and disgust a man can only feel when expecting pain and not receiving it, ‘is it out of trust, or do you truly not care if you die?’ ‘If it is by your hand, I would make no attempt to stop it’ Merlin replies, breathing just as heavy, a small shake of his head and scrunch of his brow - as if the answer were obvious. If this was what the king wanted - if this was how a destiny ends - for once in his life Merlin would comply with the order freely. -------During a bandit attack Arthur discovers Merlin's magic.How will this change them? Or have they already changed too much for it to matter? Can you truly hide who you are, or are you doomed to be known? UPDATED SCHEDULE - 1 chapter on Tuesdays and Saturdays (2 chapters a week)

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Losing or gaining control (is sometimes closer to each other than you think)
entry.summary:
Author: sword_and_shield_22

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 235,445Chapters: 56/58Kudos: 172

Summary: Merlin has never learnt to control his magic. It is completely guided by his emotions and that usually doesn't turn out well.Arthur was chased out of Camelot as a young prince. His own sister killed their father and now he is just waiting for the right moment to reclaim his kingdom.When Merlin and Arthur meet, a hope seems to take root in the world that all will be well.Magical figures, dark magic, lies and betrayal make their experiences together anything but easy. But deep friendships, trust, loyalty and love bring them ever closer to their goal.Will Merlin find the control he needs and can Arthur forget his past to open his heart?

entry.title: A Legend that Begins With a Crush
entry.summary:
Author: Clearwater96

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,907,790Chapters: 123/?Kudos: 1,605

Summary: Arthur Pendragon and Merlin were literally from two different worlds. One is a prince from a great kingdom and the other a common farm boy from the next kingdom over. These two should have never met.But that was before they realized their parents were once friends and arranged the two of them to marry when they reached adulthood. That was before Uther turned on magic and Hunith went on the run with her infant son.Now, twenty years have passed and the Prince, Arthur Pendragon is far out of his depth. After four months of marriage and learning what he has about Merlin, he knows that things need to change, but doesn’t know what can be done.And with every attempt at trying going wrong, with mysterious boys showing up wanting to be a knight, strange physician’s trying to coerce his consort away, even stranger ladies who’ve seen to weaken Arthur’s brain, and the arrival of an odd Druid boy they need to risk it all just to get to safety…will Arthur ever get things to go right?

entry.title: King & Court
entry.summary:
Author: BeautifulFiction

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 323,328Chapters: 69/110Kudos: 3,187

Summary: Loneliness is an insidious thing. When Merlin looks at Arthur, he sees not just a prince waiting for his time to rule, but a young man struggling to find his place in the world, with little help from anyone else. The truth is, Arthur needs more than the friendship Merlin can offer. He needs people he can trust: men and women who will become his court and his confidants, and if he is going to survive to take the throne and lead Camelot into its golden age, he needs them sooner rather than later. Finding loopholes in Uther’s laws is no easy feat. Court life is a dangerous game, but it’s one Merlin has every intention of winning so that Arthur can have knights of his choosing by his side. And then there is the matter of his magic…

Author: Oakfiddle

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,638Chapters: 2/9Kudos: 11

Summary: Merlin and his mum wans to move away from Ealdor to get a fresh start, to leave his mum's abusive ex-boyfriend behind.They go to Camelot to look at a flat. His mum falls in love with the flat, and Merlin falls in love with the property manager, who also happens be the landlord's son.Why can't life be simple for once?

entry.title: Worlds Apart
entry.summary:
Author: VenomStrife

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,776Chapters: 2/12Kudos: 9

Summary: Merlin gets transported to an alternate universe where he doesn't exist. His one goal is to get back to Arthur, but this other world is hellbent on keeping him there. Arthur just wants Merlin back. He gets the help of two unlikely allies. Or better known at the story where Merthur pine for each other even when they're worlds apart.

  • platonically and romantically
  • Pining Merlin (Merlin)
  • Pining Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • They're In Love Your Honor

entry.title: An Insufferable Forever
entry.summary:
Author: Araemrys

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 32,014Chapters: 8/12Kudos: 27

Summary: Merlin, the son of the famous bakers in Camelot, had been assigned by his parents to deliver bread for tonight's feast in the castle. That was the first time he met the prince of Camelot, who wasn't like his expectations at all. Arthur Pendragon, the prince of Camelot, returned to the castle after his mission to secure a village from bandits, only to find a boy standing in a room admiring his mother's painting-a boy he found to be insufferable later. From the day they met, they decided that they wouldn't get along well, only to find a shockingly different path in life that they never expected. or Arthur and Merlin didn't like each other. They remained somehow in a complicated state between enemies and a feeling of interest in each other. That was, until one day a sorceress playfully transported them to the future, only to find they were a happy family with a son.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Sublysis
entry.summary:
Author: RubiesareforHunting

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 173,673Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 416

Summary: Merlin is a great detective. They call him Magic, for a reason. But when Arthur Pendragon realizes that the famous detective who has been plaguing his criminal organization for five years, is designated Submissive…well. All’s fair in love and war. At an impasse where both of them will do anything it takes to keep the other one from revealing their secrets, the only way to survive might just be a truce that neither of their organizations can know about.Mutually assured destruction never felt so good.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
